CVE-2014-4607.title: Integer overflow in the LZO algorithm variant in Oberhumer liblzo ...
CVE-2014-4607.description: Integer overflow in the LZO algorithm variant in Oberhumer liblzo2 and lzo-2 before 2.07 on 32-bit platforms might allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted Literal Run.
